name: Sam
headline: Software engineer. I build pipelines, agents, and analyzers at work, and a handful of D&D tools on the side. This page is mostly a list of those.
bio: I'm Sam. I work as a software engineer — mostly on document-processing pipelines and the analyzers that live downstream of them. After hours I keep building things in a similar shape, plus a few tools for the D&D campaign I've been running since 2023.

The projects above are the ones I'm still actively touching. The log is for the small things — what I tried, what didn't work, what I'll come back to. If any of this overlaps with what you're doing, get in touch.
